programs.title: Peter Rabbit
programs.desc: When Peter realises he has accidentally upset Benjamin by asking him to sit out the next garden raid, he goes to apologise only to find his cousin has gone.

programs.title: PJ Masks
programs.desc: With Motsuki's help, the moths infiltrate HQ and Gekko won't admit that he let them in until it is too late.

programs.title: Mojo Swoptops
programs.desc: A crashed meteor in the town square makes every machine in Swoppiton dance... even Mojo!

programs.title: Vida the Vet
programs.desc: Fergie is sad and disappointed when a sudden apple allergy means that she can't eat her favourite food or do her favorite activity-apple picking.

programs.title: Flower & Flour
programs.desc: World Cup fever has taken over the Plaza! But when the live telecast is interrupted, Flower and Flour find a way for the whole plaza to have their own World Cup soccer match.

programs.title: Peppa Pig:
programs.desc: Peppa helps out with Danny Dog refurbishing his bedroom, and imagines a pirate adventure along the way.
